title: Beta, Alpha & Industry Research — Strategy Generation & Improvement
summary: Three-chapter report: (1) narrative summary tying together the day's beta/alpha/industry research — idio vol vs beta vol vs total vol as predictors (mechanical artifact, not real alpha), LV/MOM/MR classified by market-beta quartile, industry group signals, an industry-vol filter that improves MOM Sharpe both IS and OOS, MR's idiosyncratic-vs-industry vol split and a direct Stage-2 test of it (not adopted), and a beta-bucket LV substitute that looked strong IS but collapsed OOS; (2) the full idio/beta/total-vol quartile report; (3) the interactive Industry Explorer.
author: Arvind Rajan

title: BPGS · Return Decomposition Explorer
summary: Stock-level 2-factor return decomposition (market SPY + industry group). Rolling β(market), β(group), annualised α, variance attribution, and cumulative return vs peers and SPY. Month-end samples, interactive stock/date/window picker.
author: Arvind Rajan

title: Automated Credit Analyst — Model Feasibility & Framework
summary: Comprehensive reference covering 40+ credit risk models across 9 families: accounting/statistical (Altman Z, CHS, O-score), structural (Merton, naïve-DD), intensity/reduced-form, machine learning (XGBoost, stacked ensemble), ratings-transition, LGD/severity, macro & hybrid. Equity-bond disconnect analysis, macro sensitivity matrix by sector, and free fixed-income data sources.
author: Mani Sabapathi

title: Beta Persistence & Blended Half-Life Analysis
summary: Non-overlapping beta quartile transition matrices (N-month window → next single month). Exponentially-weighted blended beta with half-lives 1/3/6/9/12m and equal weights. Decile/quartile forward-return tables with HML and DRN regime breakdowns and 90% confidence intervals.
author: Arvind Rajan

title: LEAPS Greek Attribution — SPY / IWM / QQQ
summary: 0.08-delta Jan LEAPS, no-roll 6-month hold across three indices: option P&L + T-bill interest on freed capital vs delta-equivalent shares. Tabbed, interactive.
author: Mani Sabapathi

title: Regime Analysis Dashboard
summary: Interactive regime breakdown across 6 market dimensions (SPY drawdown, VIX, trend, momentum, breadth, sector rotation). 3-, 5-, and 10-bucket tabs. IS/OOS toggle. Stats: Ann Ret, Vol, Sharpe, Hit%, Max DD, Worst/Best Month for MR, LV, MOM, and SPY across regimes.
author: Mani Sabapathi

title: BPGS Blended Strategy Report
summary: Two-tab interactive report: HML (SPY 3yr percentile) and D/R/N regime blends. M1 Kelly + M4 fixed-vol methods, log-scale equity curves, regime shading on all time charts, monthly regime area chart, tighter tables, full reproducibility config embedded.
author: Arvind Rajan

title: Bottom-Up Engine — Framework & Moat Taxonomy
summary: Framework for identifying durable compounders: moat taxonomy (network, switching cost, cost advantage, intangible), scoring schema, base-rate analysis, and matched-loser discipline. Companion to the top-down quant engine.
author: Arvind Rajan

title: Meta-Engine Design — Historical Tests
summary: Historical backtests supporting the meta-engine design: regime classification sensitivity, strategy performance across regimes, and blended portfolio results across the full 2001–2026 history.
author: Arvind Rajan

title: Meta-Engine Design — Framework
summary: 5-layer top-down quant engine: universe, regime, strategy selection, sizing, and execution. Strategy library with 4-shelf architecture (quant, discretionary, hybrid, research). Interactive 9-tab explorer.
author: Arvind Rajan

title: Quantitative Strategy Dashboard
summary: Updated dashboard with Blend D (5-bucket quintile regime) added alongside Blend C — new card, regime table, and all charts.
author: Mani Sabapathi

title: Quantitative Strategy Dashboard
summary: Full performance deck: MR, LV, MOM and Blend C strategies with IS/OOS stats, regime analysis, year-by-year heatmap and correlation matrices.
author: Mani Sabapathi

title: SPY Drawdown / Drawup Heatmap
summary: Calendar heatmap of SPY drawdown and drawup regimes. Shows historical bear and bull periods with magnitude and duration across the full data history.
author: Mani Sabapathi

title: SPY 3yr Percentile Regime Weights
summary: Regime-switching weight analysis using SPY 3-year rolling percentile. Shows optimal LV/MOM/MR/TBill allocations across Bear, Mid and Bull regimes with IS/OOS performance breakdown.
author: Mani Sabapathi

title: SPY Drawdown Visualization
summary: Interactive SPY drawdown chart with regime shading. Companion to the heatmap — shows peak-to-trough drawdown series with Bear/Mid/Bull regime overlays.
author: Mani Sabapathi

title: Blend Strategy Grid Visualization
summary: Performance surface across LV/MOM/MR weight combinations. Grid search of blended strategy returns showing the optimal weight region and sensitivity to allocation changes.
author: Mani Sabapathi
